Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.MediaErr

Packages that use MediaErr
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.join An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http Mediagroup parameters specialized for HTTP file play and record 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network.

          Indicates success: there was no error.

          Error returned by MediaEvent.getError() when there is no error.

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return MediaErr
 MediaErr MediaEvent.getError()
          Identify the reason or cause of an error or failure.
 

Uses of MediaErr in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.join declared as MediaErr
static MediaErr JoinEvent.NO_TRANSCODER
          Error sent by media server when it is unable to perform the transcoding required by the join.
static MediaErr JoinEvent.TOO_MANY_JOINEES
          Error sent by media server when the number of joined objects is too high (value is implementation dependent).
 

Uses of MediaErr in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup.http declared as MediaErr
static MediaErr HttpFileRecorderConstants.RECORD_FAILED
          Generic error thrown when the http record fail
 

Uses of MediaErr in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection declared as MediaErr
static MediaErr SdpPortManagerEvent.RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
          Error sent by media server in case of resource shortage.
static MediaErr SdpPortManagerEvent.SDP_GLARE
          Error reported by the media server when both sides of the media channel attempted to re-negotiate the SDP at the same time.
static MediaErr SdpPortManagerEvent.SDP_NOT_ACCEPTABLE
          Error sent when the offer/answer procedure does not find any matching codec for any stream.
